title: What is Barista F.I.R.E?
subtitle: The Complete Barista FIRE Blueprint: How to Retire Partially
description: A detailed breakdown of the math behind Barista FIRE

faqs.question: What is Barista FIRE?
faqs.answer: Barista FIRE is a partial early retirement strategy where investments cover part of your expenses while lower-stress part-time work covers the rest.

faqs.question: How is Barista FIRE different from traditional FIRE?
faqs.answer: Traditional FIRE requires enough invested assets to cover nearly all living expenses, while Barista FIRE relies on a smaller portfolio plus ongoing flexible income.
